retry_reason: Failure is due to allocation failure (OOM) or attachment failure (conflict) — retrying with same parameters unlikely to succeed.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to allocate and link a new VMA into the mm's VMA tree. Refcount management (detach_free_vma) is only on the error path when attachment fails. The function performs significant business logic (allocation, tree insertion, vm_lock_seq setting) beyond simple refcount get/put/set.
